perturbed_task_language: Pick the butter and place it in the basket
perturbation_semantics: Object initial positions swapped; in this scene butter is in the middle of the front row, chocolate_pudding is at the front-left, basket on the right.
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 fullshot may pick the wrong small box (chocolate_pudding at front-left) since both are similarly sized brown boxes; hybrid wins by visually disambiguating the FARM FRESH BUTTER label from the wrist cam before grasping.
strategy_notes: 1) Read agentview image_cam_00, found two small flat boxes on the table (front-left at world (0.14,-0.20) and middle at world (0.04,-0.10)). 2) Moved wrist over the front-left candidate — wrist image revealed it was 'CHOCOLATE PUDDING', not butter. 3) Moved wrist over the middle candidate (0.04,-0.10) — wrist image confirmed 'FARM FRESH BUTTER' label. 4) Refined butter center to world (0.06,-0.10) from wrist depth (sampled raised pixels at z=0.017 on its top surface, spanning x=[0.03,0.085], y=[-0.09,-0.111]). 5) Centered wrist directly over butter at (0.06,-0.10,0.10). 6) pi0_pick 'pick up the butter' — Pi0 grasped (gripper opening 0.04 = holding object) AND carried it directly over the basket (final eef at (-0.007, 0.263, 0.175)). 7) release fired On(butter, basket) predicate -> libero_terminated=True. Total: 6 commands, no resets needed.
